# clang trunk: assertion failed in cast<FunctionDecl> during Sema processing of attribute((packed)) on incomplete struct member with #include inside struct body

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173894
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-30T04:47:14Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/Mjr18Whjq

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Code
```c
typedef unsigned INT16U ;
typedef struct tst_2 {
INT16U f0 ;
__attribute__ ( ( __packed__ ) ) t2 ;
#include <stddef.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
int main ( void ) {
if ( offsetof ( t2 , f1 ) != 2 )
abort ( ) ;
if ( offsetof ( t2 , f2 ) != 6 )
abort ( ) ;
}
```

## Code
```c
typedef unsigned INT16U ;
typedef struct tst_2 {
INT16U f0 ;
__attribute__ ( ( __packed__ ) ) t2 ;
#include &lt;stddef.h&gt;
#include &lt;stdlib.h&gt;
```

---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Reduces to
```cpp
typedef struct tst_2 {
#include <stdlib.h>
}
```
In particular the line using `attribute((packed))` is not relevant.

Likely the same issue as reported in https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/122058. Also likely same cause as https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/50321.

---
